name: Substack
description: Specs and technical requirements for all Substack content formats.

items.name: Post Cover Image
items.notes: Shown at top of post and in email preview; also used for Open Graph social sharing

items.name: Publication Logo
items.notes: Displayed in subscriber inboxes and the publication header

items.name: Publication Cover Photo
items.notes: Banner image shown on your Substack publication homepage

items.name: Inline Post Image
items.notes: Images embedded in the body of a post or newsletter

items.name: Video Post
items.notes: Hosted video for paid subscribers; H.264 + AAC recommended

items.name: Podcast / Audio Post
items.notes: Audio-first posts with waveform player; 192 kbps MP3 recommended

items.name: Post / Newsletter Title
items.notes: Used as email subject line when sent to subscribers

items.name: Post Subtitle
items.notes: Appears under the title in the post header

items.name: Post Body
items.notes: Rich text editor with Markdown; no character cap

items.name: Publication Description
items.notes: Shown on the publication page and in the Substack directory

items.name: Author Photo
items.notes: Displayed as a circle in posts and author bylines

items.name: Publication Logo
items.notes: Square format; appears in subscriber email clients

items.name: Pledge / Paid Post Preview
items.notes: Free preview shown to non-subscribers before paywall; no specific image size requirement

items.name: Referral Programme Image
items.notes: Promotional image shared when readers refer new subscribers
